objective.description: Audit the existing process_document_task in api/tasks/document_processing_tasks.py to ensure it properly integrates with Phase 2 services (entity-aware chunker, structured entity extractor, retry logic).

components.component: KGProcessingTask base class - Shared processor logic

context.note: This plan will verify that these tasks use the new Phase 2 services and handle errors correctly.

verification_command.command: cd AURA-NOTES-MANAGER ../../.venv/Scripts/python -c " import inspect from api.tasks.document_processing_tasks import process_document_task print('process_document_task signature:') print(inspect.signature(process_document_task)) print() print('Task configuration:') print(f' Name: {process_document_task.name}') print(f' Max retries: {process_document_task.max_retries}') print(f' Rate limit: {process_document_task.rate_limit}') "

task.title: Verify Integration with Phase 2 Services
task.description: Check that the task uses new Phase 2 services through kg_processor.py

verification_command.command:
# Check for Phase 2 service imports grep -n "entity_aware_chunker\|llm_entity_extractor" api/tasks/document_processing_tasks.py
# Expected imports: # from services.entity_aware_chunker import EntityAwareChunker # from services.llm_entity_extractor import LLMEntityExtractor
# If missing, check kg_processor.py imports them grep -n "entity_aware_chunker\|llm_entity_extractor" api/kg_processor.py

# Check KnowledgeGraphProcessor uses Phase 2 services ../../.venv/Scripts/python -c " from api.kg_processor import KnowledgeGraphProcessor import inspect
# Get the process_document method source = inspect.getsource(KnowledgeGraphProcessor.process_document)
# Check for Phase 2 service usage checks = { 'Uses EntityAwareChunker': 'EntityAwareChunker' in source or 'entity_aware_chunker' in source, 'Uses LLMEntityExtractor': 'LLMEntityExtractor' in source or 'extract_entities' in source, 'Has retry logic': 'retry' in source or 'tenacity' in source, }
print('KnowledgeGraphProcessor.process_document integration:') for check, result in checks.items(): status = '✅' if result else '❌' print(f' {status} {check}') "
# Find exception handling blocks grep -A5 "except" api/tasks/document_processing_tasks.py | head -50

required_error_handling.handler: Updates Firestore document status on failure
Logs errors with context (document_id, user_id, etc.)

expected_task_decorator.task_decorator: @app.task( bind=True, base=KGProcessingTask, name='api.tasks.document_processing_tasks.process_document_task', max_retries=3, autoretry_for=(Exception,), retry_backoff=True, retry_backoff_max=600, # 10 minutes retry_jitter=True )

verification_command.command: # Find all update_state calls grep -n "update_state\|update_progress" api/tasks/document_processing_tasks.py

task.title: Verify Firestore Status Sync
task.description: Check that task updates Firestore document status

verification_command.command: # Find Firestore update calls grep -n "_find_note_by_id\|_update_note_status" api/tasks/document_processing_tasks.py

required_firestore_updates.update: Sets processingStatus to "processing" on task start
Sets entityCount and chunkCount on completion

template.test_script:
"""Test KnowledgeGraphProcessor integration with Phase 2 services."""
import asyncio from kg_processor import KnowledgeGraphProcessor
async def test_processor(): """Test basic processing flow.""" processor = KnowledgeGraphProcessor()
# Test with small sample text sample_text = """ Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn and improve from experience. Neural networks, inspired by biological neural networks, are a key technology in deep learning. """
print("Testing KnowledgeGraphProcessor...") print(f"Input text: {len(sample_text)} characters")
# Test chunking print("\n1. Chunking...") chunks = processor.chunk_text(sample_text) print(f" Generated {len(chunks)} chunks")
# Test entity extraction (may require ADC credentials) print("\n2. Entity extraction...") try: entities = await processor.extract_entities(chunks[0] if chunks else sample_text) print(f" Extracted {len(entities.get('entities', []))} entities") print(f" Extracted {len(entities.get('relationships', []))} relationships") except Exception as e: print(f" ⚠️ Skipped (requires ADC): {e}")
print("\n✅ Basic processor test passed")
if __name__ == "__main__": asyncio.run(test_processor())

template.docstring:
@app.task(...) def process_document_task(self, document_id: str, module_id: str, user_id: str): """ Process a single document and extract knowledge graph entities.
This task orchestrates the full document processing pipeline: 1. Text extraction from document file 2. Entity-aware semantic chunking (Phase 2) 3. Embedding generation via Vertex AI (Phase 2) 4. Structured entity extraction with retry (Phase 2) 5. Knowledge graph storage in Neo4j 6. Firestore status synchronization
Args: document_id: Unique document/note identifier in Firestore module_id: Module ID for scoping document lookup user_id: User who initiated processing
Returns: dict: Processing result with status, entity_count, chunk_count
Raises: SoftTimeLimitExceeded: Task exceeded time limit (5 min) MaxRetriesExceededError: All retry attempts exhausted Exception: Unexpected processing error
Progress States: PENDING (0%) → RECEIVED (5%) → PARSING (10%) → CHUNKING (30%) → EMBEDDING (50%) → EXTRACTING (70%) → STORING (90%) → COMPLETED (100%)
Celery Configuration: - Max retries: 3 - Retry backoff: Exponential (max 10 min) - Time limit: 5 minutes - Queue: kg_processing
Phase 2 Integration: - Uses services/entity_aware_chunker.py for semantic chunking - Uses services/llm_entity_extractor.py for structured extraction - Uses services/vertex_ai_client.py for Vertex AI authentication - Implements tenacity retry logic for LLM calls """

command.description: Verify task imports Phase 2 services (via kg_processor)
command.code: ../../.venv/Scripts/python -c " from api.kg_processor import KnowledgeGraphProcessor from api.tasks.document_processing_tasks import process_document_task print('✅ Task and processor imports successful') "

../../.venv/Scripts/python -c " from api.tasks.document_processing_tasks import process_document_task print('Task Configuration:') print(f' Name: {process_document_task.name}') print(f' Max retries: {process_document_task.max_retries}') print(f' Base class: {process_document_task.__class__.__bases__[0].__name__}') "

success_criteria.criterion: Error handling covers all failure modes
Retry configuration is appropriate (3 retries, exponential backoff)
Progress tracking updates at each stage

issue.cause: Tasks fail permanently on transient errors

next_steps.step: After completion, proceed to: 03-03-PLAN.md - Enhance End-to-End Test Script

notes.note: The task itself may not need changes if KnowledgeGraphProcessor is properly updated in Phase 2
Focus on verification first, only update if integration gaps found
Test mode (AURA_TEST_MODE=true) can be used to skip actual LLM calls during testing

status.verification_summary: All 8 success criteria verified and passed
